prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: **主角视觉描述提示词：**

A full-body character design of Mo Lin (林默), a young male detective with extremely low attractiveness and very ordinary appearance. He has plain, unremarkable facial features with no standout qualities - average-sized eyes behind dark-framed glasses, a common nose, and thin lips. His face shows a slightly weary expression but with sharp, perceptive eyes that hint at his analytical nature. He has a lean, slender build that appears somewhat tired.

He wears a simple, plain light-colored dress shirt (white or pale blue) with sleeves rolled up slightly, paired with dark trousers. His clothing is practical and unpretentious, fitting for a working detective. His hair is dark and kept in a simple, neat style - not fashionable but well-groomed. His overall appearance is that of someone who blends into crowds easily due to his completely ordinary looks.

His posture shows focused concentration, with a quiet, observant demeanor. Despite his plain appearance, his eyes reveal an intense, analytical gaze that suggests deep thinking and attention to detail. His expression is serious and contemplative, befitting someone who solves complex cold cases through careful observation.

The character should be rendered in impressionist oil painting style with rich light and shadow variations, visible brushstrokes, standing centered against a pure white background. Full-body view, no text, no symbols, no words.

**Key elements: ordinary appearance, dark glasses, plain shirt, weary but focused expression, lean build, quiet demeanor, sharp analytical eyes, modern London detective aesthetic, impressionist oil painting style.**, full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: oil_painting
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
